Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.commons.settings.PropertySource

Packages that use PropertySource
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.settings
Thread-safe system property access with support for global and per-thread overrides, making it useful for unit tests and configuration management.
org.apache.juneau.config
Configuration Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.springboot
Spring Boot Integration

  • Uses of PropertySource in org.apache.juneau.commons.settings

    Subinterfaces of PropertySource in org.apache.juneau.commons.settings
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    FunctionalPropertySource
    A functional interface for creating read-only PropertySource instances from a function.
    interface 
    PropertyStore
    A writable extension of PropertySource that supports modifying property values.
    Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.settings that implement PropertySource
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ArgsPropertySource
    Property source backed by Args.
    class 
    DotenvPropertySource
    Property source backed by a dotenv file.
    class 
    FunctionalPropertyStore
    A writable PropertyStore implementation created from functional interfaces.
    class 
    ManifestFilePropertySource
    Property source backed by ManifestFile.
    class 
    MapStore
    A writable PropertyStore implementation backed by a thread-safe map.
    class 
    RelaxedPropertySource
    A PropertySource decorator that adds relaxed binding over a delegate source.
    class 
    SystemEnvPropertySource
    Property source backed by System.getenv(String).
    class 
    SystemPropertyPropertySource
    Property source backed by System.getProperty(String).
    Fields in org.apache.juneau.commons.settings declared as PropertySource
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final PropertySource
    Settings.RELAXED_SYSTEM_ENV_SOURCE
    Settings.SYSTEM_ENV_SOURCE wrapped with relaxed binding, so a single logical key resolves from any of the common environment-variable spellings (e.g.
    static final PropertySource
    Settings.SYSTEM_ENV_SOURCE
    System environment variable source that delegates to System.getenv(String).
    static final PropertySource
    Settings.SYSTEM_PROPERTY_SOURCE
    System property source that delegates to System.getProperty(String).

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.settings with parameters of type PropertySource
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Settings
    Settings.addSource(PropertySource source)
    Adds a property source after this settings instance has been built.
    Settings.Builder
    Settings.Builder.addSource(PropertySource source)
    Adds a source to the sources list.
    boolean
    Settings.removeSource(PropertySource source)
    Removes a previously-added property source.
    final Settings.Builder
    Settings.Builder.setSources(PropertySource... sources)
    Sets the sources list, replacing any existing sources.
